homeInfo.title: Audio Quality Evaluation
homeInfo.message:
Welcome to this audio quality evaluation test.

You will listen to 11 audio samples and answer 2 questions about each one.
Please use headphones and ensure you are in a quiet environment.

For each question, rate the audio on a scale from 1 (worst) to 7 (best).

Click the button below when you are ready to begin.

questions.name: Sample 1
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: solo acoustic nylon string guitar playing in a fingerstyle Brazilian bossa nova style.

prompts.0: How correct is the description of the audio excerpt? Consider a correct caption to not have any information absent from the audio. Use the worst score if all the information in the caption is absent from the audio, and use the best score if all the information in the caption is present in the audio.
prompts.1: How complete is the description of the audio excerpt? Consider a complete caption to have all relevant information concerning genre, mood, and instrumentation of the audio. Use the worst score if the caption does not have any relevant information on these aspects for the audio, and the best score if the caption contains all relevant information on these aspects for the audio.

questions.name: Sample 2
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental rock track features a fast-paced and complex solo electric guitar supported by a solid bass line and driving acoustic drums. The heavy, energetic rhythm creates a dynamic atmosphere that is particularly well-suited for a live performance setting or a guitar showcase.

questions.name: Sample 4
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental rock track features a strong, steady beat driven by electric guitar and bass lines. The energetic and upbeat mood creates a sense of forward momentum that is supported by acoustic drums and cymbals. Although the upload tags suggest electronic or film score elements, the primary sound remains a dynamic and tense piece of heavy rock instrumentation.

questions.description:

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This energetic instrumental rock track features an electric guitar playing a fast, high-register solo over driving rhythm guitars and acoustic drums. Accompanied by a bass guitar anchoring the root notes, the piece captures a dynamic atmosphere suitable for a teenage drama soundtrack. The composition balances melodic guitar lines with solid rhythmic support to create an engaging audio experience.

questions.name: Sample 9
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This energetic and aggressive instrumental rock track captures the raw spirit of a punk live performance from the early 1980s. A distorted electric guitar drives the fast-paced rhythm, accompanied by powerful drums and high-pitched male vocals that amplify the heavy atmosphere. The piece perfectly embodies the chaotic intensity of the New York hardcore scene during its classic era.

Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track features a gritty, distorted guitar solo and a complex, fast-paced drum performance with frequent fill-ins. The rhythm section includes driving cymbal crashes that support an energetic and heavy rock beat typical of grunge-influenced music. Although the audio captures the intensity of a band rehearsal, it also reflects the experimental noise characteristics associated with its source material.

questions.name: About You
questions.description: Please tell us about your musical background.

fields.label: How many years of musical experience do you have?
Please describe your musical experience (instruments played, training, listening habits, etc.)
fields.placeholder: e.g. I've played piano for 10 years and studied music theory in college...
